prompt: The tutorial on basic operations is too abstract. Use more concrete examples with real numbers. Also add a section about mixed numbers.

assertions.text: diataxis.toml guidance fields were updated to reflect revision feedback
Guidance reads as a coherent whole, not as an appended REVISION FEEDBACK block
Tutorial files contain concrete numeric examples using LaTeX notation
A mixed numbers section exists in the tutorials
diataxis.toml covers field was updated to include mixed numbers
